creator: p5B2EA84B3@t-online.de
text:
Having built with port option GSETTINGS=on module-gsettings fails to load when starting pulseaudio:

pulseaudio[2700]: [] module.c: Failed to load module "module-gsettings" (argument: ""): initialization failed.

BTW port metadata seams to be wrong: WWW: https://pulseaudio.org/
